message.content:
Got it—happy to help. Can you share the experiment report (or the relevant parts of it)? Once I can read what you wrote—procedure, data, calculations, discussion, conclusion, etc.—I’ll go through and point out:

- where things don’t line up with the data or theory,  
- any mistakes in calculations or units,  
- sections that are unclear or missing,  
- and any formatting / style issues for a lab report.

If there were specific comments from the TA or professor, you can include those too and I’ll help match them to what went wrong.
